channel.title: Comments on: Savannah Brewfest – Ep. 70
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Steve Matthews
item.dc:creator: Steve Matthews
item.description: AAAAAh aaah aaaah gag gag. "...and a good time was had by all." Great fun.
item.content:encoded: AAAAAh aaah aaaah gag gag. “…and a good time was had by all.” Great fun.

item.title: By: Video BrewMaster
item.dc:creator: Video BrewMaster
item.description: Andrew, great thoughts, thanks for sharing! Steve, say it IS so, yes we did drink out of the swill pot - once again, when at these things, MODERATION is the best advice! Keith, you're a lucky man, hope you had a great honeymoon.
item.content:encoded: Andrew, great thoughts, thanks for sharing! Steve, say it IS so, yes we did drink out of the swill pot – once again, when at these things, MODERATION is the best advice! Keith, you’re a lucky man, hope you had a great honeymoon.

item.title: By: Keith
item.dc:creator: Keith
item.description:
Hey guys,
Another great episode. Wish I could make it to the SCBF but just gopt back from honeymoon. Traveled to Full Sail Brewery,Deschutes Brewery and many local brewpubs. Any wonder I married this girl? Anyway great job guys and a shout out to Ray at Full Sail.
item.content:encoded:
Hey guys,

Another great episode. Wish I could make it to the SCBF but just gopt back from honeymoon. Traveled to Full Sail Brewery,Deschutes Brewery and many local brewpubs. Any wonder I married this girl? Anyway great job guys and a shout out to Ray at Full Sail.

item.title: By: Steve M.
item.dc:creator: Steve M.
item.description: No!! Say it ain't so! I did not see you guys actually sample the spitoon, did I? "Gag me with a spoon" someone once said. Dude! Just daring to do it was enough! Yuk.
item.content:encoded: No!! Say it ain’t so! I did not see you guys actually sample the spitoon, did I? “Gag me with a spoon” someone once said. Dude! Just daring to do it was enough! Yuk.

item.title: By: andrewt248
item.dc:creator: andrewt248
item.description: Man, that's so awesome to see that craft brewing has so many fans! You know that there are 5-10 people at home who love craft beer for every 1 at the festival, too! Did I hear Skynyrd in the background at the end there?
item.content:encoded: Man, that’s so awesome to see that craft brewing has so many fans! You know that there are 5-10 people at home who love craft beer for every 1 at the festival, too! Did I hear Skynyrd in the background at the end there?
